draft.subject: Built something for you — your personal sleep guide
draft.body:
Hey Vanessa,

I put together a little sleep guide just for you. It's live here: https://path-concord-ink-visitor.trycloudflare.com/sleep.html

Here's what you can ask it:
- "What's a good wind-down routine for tonight?"
- "Why am I waking up at 3 AM?"
- "Give me a sleep tip based on my patterns"
- "What should I avoid before bed?"

It learns from what you tell it, so the more you use it, the better it gets. Let me know what you think.

Matt
